case_title: MARCO POLO RAMIREZ LEDESMA VS. IGNACIO PELAYO SOLTERO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED SEP-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOLTERO, IGNACIO PELAYO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,434.48 FILED BY LEDESMA, MARCO POLO RAMIREZ AS TO DEFENDANT SOLTERO, IGNACIO PELAYO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF MARCO POLO RAMIREZ LEDSEMA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT IGNACIO PELAYO SOLTERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER MELISSA DOVERA. THE NON-COURT- CERTIFIED INTERPRETER MELISSA DOVERA WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK, R.SAHAJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEDESMA, MARCO POLO RAMIREZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOLTERO, IGNACIO PELAYO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LEDESMA, MARCO POLO RAMIREZ
